creator: freebsd@mldelaney.com
text:
Thanks for the feedback.

I did try to follow your directions as much as I could, including the `pkg upgrade` and `pkg autoremove` and the config `diff` section. Everything seems to be find, as no errors were thrown and the config files differences were expected.

From what I could tell, ruby2.7 installs the file "/usr/local/bin/ruby":
```
sudo pkg which /usr/local/bin/ruby
/usr/local/bin/ruby was installed by package ruby-2.7.6,1
```

And in contrast, ruby3.0 does not:
```
sudo pkg info --list-files ruby30 | grep "bin/ruby"
        /usr/local/bin/ruby30
```

Maybe I'm missing something here? Sorry to be a pain.
